# Do Stuff & Have Fun

Do Stuff & Have Fun is a 10-game browser arcade. The site has one YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/@EPICMAPPING023

Main page:
- https://dostuffandhavefun.com/

Games:
- Dot Dodge: Move the square and dodge falling blocks.
- Star Catch: Slide the tray and catch the bright drops.
- Snake Snack: Steer the snake, eat snacks, avoid yourself.
- Memory Match: Flip cards and find every pair.
- Target Pop: Pop targets before the timer runs out.
- Color Swap: Match the falling color before it lands.
- Mini Pong: Keep the ball away from your side.
- Maze Run: Reach the exit without touching walls.
- Stack Jump: Jump over blocks and keep running.
- Number Nudge: Hit the target number before time runs out.
